emails.subject: [Reminder 1] Training Requirement â Full Stack Development
emails.body:
Dear Software Architect,

This is a gentle follow-up (Reminder 1) to our earlier email regarding the Full Stack Development training requirement.

We haven't received your response yet. Kindly let us know your interest and availability at the earliest.

---

Dear Software Architect,

We have received a training requirement for Full Stack Development and are looking for a trainer with relevant experience.

Training Details:

Domain/Technology: Full Stack Development

At this stage, we are checking your interest and availability first. Once you confirm, we will share the confirmed duration, schedule, participants, and other requirement details as they are finalized.

Please let us know if you are interested and available for this requirement. Kindly share your updated trainer profile along with relevant experience.

Regards,
TrainerSync Team
